productDisplayName: Classic Polo Classic Polo Swiss Brown Tee T-Shirt
description: CompositionBrown polo neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, with ribbed collar and cuff, embroidered logo on left chest, short buttoned placket, grey fabric tape on the inseam of the collar, vented hem and badge appliqued on right sleeveFittingSlimWash care Use mild detergent Avoid beating and twisting Wash in cold water Rinse thoroughly Iron at low temperature Dry in shade on reverse side Tumble wash/ dry This brown tee from classic polo redefines casual chic. The chocolaty brown color looks equally great in the day and night. Team this slim Fit t-shirt with jeans or chinos for the perfect look. Sit back and enjoy as people admire your elegant and classic outift!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
